title: Level 276.1

{{Rewrite in Progress |reason=Short and underdeveloped, outdated lore and SPaG. |author=[[User:Lancelot Chen|Lancelot Chen]], [[User:Banbanshiro1234|Pintora]], [[User:Frogo23|Frogo]], [[User:BoijyYTgggy667|Boijy]], [[User:Boxtrox Requiem|Boxtrox Requiem]], [[User:ScribbleRibbit3|Nacho]], |rewriter=[[User:Small.webp|Smalla]] |progress=45%, progress [[User:Small.webp/276.1|here]]. }} {{DISPLAYTITLE:Level 276.1: "Interstellar"}} {{Background|file=ya.png}} {{Audio|file=Across the Stars.mp3|loop=yes|volume=3|align=center}} {{Class Custom Image|bg-image=ya.png|class=2e - Environmental|hexagon=E|safety=Unsafe|security=Unsecure|entity=Non-Entity Hazards}}
'''Level 276.1''' is a sub-level between [[Level 276]] and [[Level 277]].
==Description== '''Level 276.1''', otherwise known as '''Interstellar''', resembles a spherical air layer surrounding anti-gravitational pieces of continents in a vacuum space with a small amount of interstellar dust floating around. The floating islands are interconnecting with stable, half-transparent wormholes that by some means allow humans to breathe inside. Inside the islands are usually large repetitive structures that are either repeating themselves or are symmetrical. Some of the islands exhibit vegetation; while most of them come from the [[The Frontrooms]], other unknown species are present. Some of the plant species are venomous or emit toxic gas which can damage the lungs of a human. None of them brings life threats, and the effects will fade away slowly after losing direct contact. However, prolonged contact can make one extremely sick. If one feels dizzy while standing near the plant, it is strongly advised to stay away and report the plant to [[M.E.G.]] authorities. Structures within this level are constructed of limestone and Liquid Pain on them, while some of the small interior decorations are sometimes metallic. The temperature of the level remains at typical greenhouse temperature, and the reason for this is unknown as it does not fit the thermal thesis. Commonly, the temperature around the space of the entire level is around -200 Celsius, and it is not safe at all to leave space. It is strongly advised against leaving the atmosphere of the island, as the outside of the air layer functions as a vacuum, and one could explode due to the pressure difference and/or die from asphyxia due to the lack of oxygen in outer space. Wormholes could be used as a teleporter to travel to other islands, with it only having a cooldown of a few seconds. But in reality, around 30 minutes would have passed traveling through the wormholes due to the time wrap property of them. However, although most wormholes are mysterious and undiscovered but are safe up for now, and no exceptional cases have been reported. ==Entities==
===Bioluminescent Worms=== {{Blurimage|file=Hyponis_worms.PNG|caption=An image of the Bioluminescent Worms being researched on.}} One of the documented entities are Bioluminescent Worms. These worms have a distinct blue glow emitting from their bodies and are generally harmless; however, it should be known clearly that consuming these will make the user drowsy and drunk. These worms are not a severe danger or as important as [[Wormlings]], but it is currently being researched if they have some connection with each other, from their similar properties and effects when consumed or turned into substances. Some colonies and outposts even seek out these worms and try to convert them into [[Wormlings]], trying to harvest their benefits, but their efforts remain futile as of now. If you do decide to eat these worms, they taste like gummy worms, and depending on how much light they emit, their taste can be sweet to sour, sour being the brightest. They have been shown to increase one's energy. They're also really helpful when trying to help someone snap back into reality, proving as a great medicine for wanderers under the control of a psychological entity.
==Colonies and Outposts== Due to a lack of general incentive, its possible isolating properties, and the fact that its terrain does not allow for permanent settlements, no colonies or outposts were successfully established within '''Level 276.1'''. The level's immense size and multiple hazards that reside in the level also do not entice many long-term inhabitants to attempt the creation of permanent housing, and community-building would prove difficult due to its strange auditory properties. ==Entrances and Exits== ===Entrances=== *Noclipping through the air borders in [[Level 276]]. ===Exits=== *Travelling through a wormhole has a chance to send you back to [[Level 276]].
